issue_summary: Made RandomDataImpl consistently use a Well generator as the default random generator. This completes the fix for JIRA: . The inconsistency was reported by Dennis Hendriks in JIRA: .
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Reseeds the random number generator with the current time in
     * milliseconds.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Reseeds the random number generator with
     * {@code System.currentTimeMillis() + System.identityHashCode(this))}.
     */
